title: Orphan state branch + bl init routing
description: Implement SPEC sections 4, 8, 10: create orphan branch balls/tasks in bl init, check it out at .balls/worktree via git worktree add, symlink .balls/tasks to .balls/worktree/.balls/tasks, gitignore both in main, route all task file reads/writes through the state worktree so commit_task commits on balls/tasks (not main), eliminate balls: create/claim/close commits from main. No users yet -> no migration command; this task migrates bl-1a34 and bl-8cd1 from main's tracked state to the state branch as part of the delivery. Commands must fail with a clear message when bl init has not been run. Conformance tests cover #1, #10, #11, #14, #15. Stealth mode carve-out unchanged. Reference docs/SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md.
